signals.headline: SEC-CFTC Framework Classifies XRP as Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC-CFTC Framework Classifies XRP as Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**

On March 17, 2026, a joint SEC-CFTC framework officially classified XRP as a commodity alongside Bitcoin and Ethereum, removing the final regulatory overhang from the Ripple Labs litigation settled in August 2025.[2] This framework resolution eliminates a major source of uncertainty that had weighed on XRP's valuation.

signals.headline: Spot ETF Inflows Reverse Previous Pattern | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Spot ETF Inflows Reverse Previous Pattern | YES | HIGH confidence**

Unlike earlier rallies driven by retail futures trading, the April surge was led by spot ETF inflows—$224 million flowed into XRP investment products in the first week of April, the largest single rebound since December.[2] Six active U.S. spot XRP ETFs now hold approximately $1 billion in combined assets and 787 million XRP in c

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Integration Goes Live | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Integration Goes Live | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, adding a major payment rail for XRP adoption.[2] XRP's $1.50 test occurred just two sessions after this launch.
